title: LunarScapeMods
description: A Quality of life modpack based on adrenaline
body:
### Welcome to LunarScape mods, This is a fork of adrenaline what adds a few quality of life mods and peformance mods to improve your overall gameplay on our server! #### **Please see our current mods bellow:**
  • Enhanced Block Entities: Optimises block entity rendering.
  • AntiGhost: Prevents ghost blocks from appearing, improving visual consistency.
  • Dynamic FPS: Reduce fps when the game is not focused.
  • Entity Culling: Optimizes rendering of entities for better performance.
  • FerriteCore: Fine-tunes various game aspects for improved efficiency and less lag.
  • ImmediatelyFast: Speeds up rendering.
  • Iris: Allows shaders.
  • ItemSwapper: Simplifies item management.
  • Krypton: Enhances network performance for smoother online gameplay.
  • LazyDFU: Optimizes resource loading when booting the game.
  • Lithium: Targets game mechanics for reduced lag and better performance.
  • ModernFix: Addresses bugs and gameplay issues for a more stable experience.
  • MoreCulling: Further optimizes entity rendering for improved performance.
  • No Telemetry: Stops telemetry data transmission for better privacy.
  • NoChatReports: Stops chat-based reports.
  • Reese's Sodium Options: Customizes settings for Sodium.
  • Skip Transitions: Saves time by skipping in-game transition animations.
  • Sodium Extra: Brings extra video settings for sodium.
  • Sodium: High-performance graphics engine for improved rendering.
  • Spu: Unlocks server resource pack to allow higher priority textures.
  • Starlight: Enhances light rendering.
  • ThreadTweak: Improves thread management.
